commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

No roster changes since yesterday. The active_strategies_snapshot remains at 80 entries for the fifth consecutive day. All 13+ INVALID strategies identified in prior sessions remain enabled — the batch kill escalation (ai-2026-06-13-002) is now in its second day without operator action.

## Headline

**v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono's drop_top3 crossed zero today (−0.087 SOL)**, triggering the standing kill criterion from ai-2026-06-10-003. The investigation is complete: this strategy is now INVALID. Meanwhile, v9shadow-velmono-dev holds at score 86.2 and remains the field's sole near-bar candidate — three gates clear, only monthly run rate (2.36 vs 3.75 SOL/mo) blocking promotion.

## Yesterday's P&L

No trades closed today (bot appears to have been in a quiet period — last shadow trade ~50 min ago per diagnose). Yesterday's performance (2026-06-13) was mixed: v55d-buyflow led with +1.051 SOL on 6 trades (n=16, still LOW-N), v52a-sm-shape added +0.355 SOL on 25 trades (despite being on the kill list — one good day doesn't change INVALID status, drop_top3=−5.075 SOL). The vel20-top5 family (V31.1, V31.2, v26-vel20-top5-ttp, v28-vel20-top5-1s-ttp, v32-vel20-top5-1s) each lost −0.672 SOL on 3 trades, consistent with the ongoing DECAYING pattern across that family.

## v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono: INVALID Verdict

Per the investigation action item ai-2026-06-10-003 (opened 2026-06-10), the monitoring trigger was "kill immediately if drop_top3 ≤ 0." Today's leave-one-out data shows drop_top3 = −0.087 SOL at n=125. The edge-decay flag is DECAYING (recent-30 median far below all-time median). This strategy's apparent total P&L (+2.28 SOL) is now entirely explained by 1–3 outlier trades — without them, it's underwater. **Recommend killing v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono and its mirror v28-velmid-liq-mono-1s-ttp (n=82, d3=−2.991 SOL, DECAYING).**

## Cross-Day Patterns

Reviewing the last seven reports: the same theme repeats every day. (1) velmono-dev scores high but monthly run rate falls short. (2) velmid-liq-mono has been flagged DECAYING since at least June 10 and its drop_top3 has been trending toward zero for days. (3) 13 INVALID strategies (ai-2026-06-13-002) have proposals sitting PROPOSED since June 11–13 with no operator kill push. The anomaly count is 15 DECAYING + 55+ strict_filter warnings, which means roughly a third of the enabled roster is emitting sustained loss signals. This is the primary drag.

**The critical outlier-robustness observation:** v9shadow-velmono-dev's top-3 trades account for 50.7% of total P&L (+3.43 SOL). The strategy is still passing the d3 gate (+1.69 SOL after removing top 3), but this concentration rate is worth watching. If one more large outlier closes in the top-3 slot and the prior #3 exits, d3 could move. Not a kill criterion today — just a flag.

## Operator Next Step

**Single most important action: push the consolidated kill command.** The escalation item ai-2026-06-13-002 lists 13 strategies. Add v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono and v28-velmid-liq-mono-1s-ttp for a total of 15. A single strategy-commands.json with 15 delete entries clears the INVALID backlog in one cycle and halves the noise from the anomaly panel. This has been the recommended action for 3+ days.

action_items.summary: Kill v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono (n=125, drop_top3=-0.087 SOL — trigger condition from ai-2026-06-10-003 met) and its 1s-poll mirror v28-velmid-liq-mono-1s-ttp (n=82, d3=-2.991 SOL, DECAYING). Both INVALID.

ESCALATION (day 3): Recommend operator push a single strategy-commands.json with 15 delete entries. New additions: velmid-liq-mono + its mirror (INVALID trigger met today). Prior 13 from ai-2026-06-13-002 unchanged. This one delete block clears the entire INVALID backlog.

Watch v9shadow-velmono-dev monthly run rate through July. Score 86.2, 3 gates clear (n=110, d3=+1.69, total=+3.43). Monthly 2.36 SOL/mo vs 3.75 bar. No action until monthly reaches 3.75 or edge shows signs of softening (d3 declining).
